message:
🐛 Fix multiple infinite loop sources blocking React Router navigation

- CardDataContext: fingerprint-based dedup in useReportCardDataState
- AlertsDataFetcher: ref-based dedup to prevent re-render loops
- helm.ts: cache demo releases, remove refresh animation in demo mode
- useCardRecommendations: ref guard on analyzeAndRecommend effect
- UpgradeStatus: ref guard on demo versions effect
- Remove debug logging from CardDataContext

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
